title: Jumptdd - Similar to Cosetek
author: dmrtn
selftext:
The one I use now is really new and called Jump, only around 2 months old. If you get in early it’s got a lot of potential. Me and a lot of my friends swapped from cos and itp to Jump due to the fact they are getting a bit too big and we reckon they are going to close down. You seem to already know about the platforms, so you know the potential earnings if you get in earlier

I made 5000 from 450 in 2 months on cos, now swapping and planning to do the same but for a longer time. Jump is far more secure and got far more earning potential, when the likes of cos and ipt close this is the next platform to skyrocket, get in early whilst you can and split your funds between platforms

Got some great support groups to get you started once signed up

[https://jumptdd.com/#/register?code=3TLC1C](https://jumptdd.com/#/register?code=3TLC1C)

If you are interested mate

comments.body:
